name: Suspicious Download Using Diantz
description: Detects the use of `diantz.exe` to download a remote file and store it in a compressed .cab file. Adversaries may use this technique for ingress tool transfer, to evade defenses, and establish C2 connections.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'diantz.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the diantz.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute diantz.exe, including arguments indicating a download to a .cab file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which diantz.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
